trigger.actions_5_targetA: AFK Players gonna die in seconds...

trigger.actions_2_targetA: did you like the map? just press ESC and rate, thanks.
trigger.actions_3_targetA: You want more? there is 6 traps maps you can play, from kaser-traps to kaser-traps6, go ahead and test it!

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Press (Restart) Or Say (-kill) Or get crashed by the wall!
